name: Jigglers
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups boiling water (or boiling apple juice)
2 packages (8 serving size) or 4 packages (4 serving size) Jell-O in any flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir boiling water (or boiling apple juice) into gelatin in a large bowl until completely dissolved.
2. Pour the mixture into a 13 x 9 inch pan and refrigerate for at least 3 hours, or until firm.
3. To release the jiggler pieces, dip the bottom of the pan in warm water for about 15 seconds.
4. Cut the jiggler pieces into decorative shapes using cookie cutters, cutting all the way through the gelatin, or cut them into 1-inch squares.
5. Lift the jiggler pieces out of the pan. Makes approximately 24 pieces.
